title: phyllanthus laciniatus
intro: Phyllanthus laciniatus, also known as the cut-leaf tree or Singapore green, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus laciniatus include reducing fever and inflammation, and it has been used to treat various ailments such as diarrhea, dysentery, and urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve stress.
